bank_accounts_user_primary_uidx.name: bank_accounts_user_primary_uidx
bank_accounts_user_primary_uidx.where: "bank_accounts"."deleted_at" is null and "bank_accounts"."is_company_account" = false and "bank_accounts"."is_primary" = true

bank_accounts_company_primary_uidx.name: bank_accounts_company_primary_uidx
bank_accounts_company_primary_uidx.where: "bank_accounts"."deleted_at" is null and "bank_accounts"."is_company_account" = true and "bank_accounts"."is_primary" = true

bank_accounts_select_admin_or_owner.name: bank_accounts_select_admin_or_owner
bank_accounts_select_admin_or_owner.using:
public.is_super_admin()
                or public.is_office_admin()
                or (
                    "bank_accounts"."is_company_account" = false
                    and exists (
                        select 1
                        from public.app_users u
                        join public.roles r on r.id = u.role_id
                        where u.supabase_user_id = auth.uid()
                          and u.is_active = true
                          and u.deleted_at is null
                          and r.slug in ('merchant', 'rider')
                          and u.id = "bank_accounts"."app_user_id"
                    )
                )

bank_accounts_owner_check.name: bank_accounts_owner_check
bank_accounts_owner_check.value:
(
                ("bank_accounts"."is_company_account" = true and "bank_accounts"."app_user_id" is null)
                or
                ("bank_accounts"."is_company_account" = false and "bank_accounts"."app_user_id" is not null)
            )

parcels_delivery_fee_payment_plan_check.name: parcels_delivery_fee_payment_plan_check
parcels_delivery_fee_payment_plan_check.value:
(
                "parcels"."delivery_fee_payment_plan" is null
                or (
                    "parcels"."delivery_fee_payer" = 'receiver'
                    and "parcels"."delivery_fee_payment_plan" = 'receiver_collect_on_delivery'
                )
                or (
                    "parcels"."delivery_fee_payer" = 'merchant'
                    and "parcels"."delivery_fee_payment_plan" in (
                        'merchant_prepaid_bank_transfer',
                        'merchant_cash_on_pickup',
                        'merchant_bill_later'
                    )
                )
                or (
                    "parcels"."delivery_fee_payer" = 'merchant'
                    and "parcels"."parcel_type" = 'cod'
                    and "parcels"."delivery_fee_payment_plan" = 'merchant_deduct_from_cod_settlement'
                )
            )
